Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching the waves roll onto[n]the shore is somewhat calming...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth asked me to[n]get her something that feels like the ocean...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's some seaweed swirling in the waters[n]at my feet. Maybe Elizabeth would like it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's some seaweed swirling in the water.[n]It'd make a great memento of our trip.[n]{f 1 1}
